channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mountain West commissioner says she's heartbroken over turmoil surrounding San Jose State volleyball
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Mountain West Conference Commissioner Gloria Nevarez said Thursday the forfeitures that volleyball teams are willing to take to avoid playing San Jose State is “not what we celebrate in college athletics” and that she is heartbroken over what has transpired this season surrounding t
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ohtani and Betts lead Dodgers to latest blowout of Mets for 3-1 lead in lopsided NLCS
item.description: Shohei Ohtani hit a leadoff homer and scored four times, Mookie Betts also went deep and drove in four runs, and the Los Angeles Dodgers routed the New York Mets 10-2 for a 3-1 lead in their lopsided National League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Mike Fitzpatrick, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Judge's clutch homer becomes footnote as Guardians walk-off Game 3 of ALCS with 2-run shot in 10th
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Aaron Judge finally delivered the kind of postseason moment in October that turns Yankees into legends. It became a footnote when New York's bullpen blew up.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Taylor Pendrith shoots 61 in first start since the Presidents Cup and leads in Las Vegas
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Taylor Pendrith took two weeks off after the Presidents Cup and didn't miss a beat, matching his career-low on the PGA Tour with a 10-under 61 that gave him a three-shot lead in the Shriners Children's Open on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A Canadian former Olympic snowboarder is wanted in a US drug trafficking case
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A former Olympic snowboarder for Canada has been charged with running a drug trafficking ring that shipped vast amounts of cocaine across the Americas and killed four people, authorities said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Virginia head coach Tony Bennett suddenly retiring, just weeks before season starts
item.description: With roughly three weeks before the Virginia Cavaliers begin their season, the school announced head coach Tony Bennett will retire, effective Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: The domed ballpark would have a 373,000-square-foot footprint and is expected to reach a height of 320 feet.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, NewsNation

item.title: East Bay’s Sabrina Ionescu delivers win with one of greatest shots in WNBA Finals history
item.description: Ionescu's 28-foot step-back three-pointer with less than a second left has the New York Liberty one win away from a championship
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Emma Hayes names USWNT roster for first matches since winning gold at the Olympics
item.description: Trinity Rodman will miss a trio of upcoming matches for the U.S. women's national soccer team as she continues to recover from a back injury. Coach Emma Hayes named her roster Thursday for games against Iceland on Oct. 24 in Austin, Texas, and Oct. 27 in Nashville.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Las Vegas Strip stadium, resort detailed in county documents; new Athletics ballpark revealed
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, ABC 4

item.title: Bears hanging tough in an NFC North that's dominated the rest of the NFL so far
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) — Never in the past two decades has any division started out as strong as the NFC North has this season. With the undefeated Minnesota Vikings leading the way, all four NFC North teams are 4-2 or better.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Prosecutors reopen investigation into PSG over alleged discrimination in recruiting
item.description: Paris prosecutors are investigating alleged discrimination by Paris Saint-Germain years ago, following a complaint by France's Human Rights League that club scouts illegally profiled potential recruits based on their origins.
item.dc:creator: SAMUEL PETREQUIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shohei Ohtani's towering home run sparks 2-word reaction from former MLB superstar
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers star Shohei Ohtani nearly sent a pitch into outer space on Wednesday night against the New York Mets. It warranted a Roger Clemens reaction.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Shohei Ohtani homers as the Dodgers rout the Mets 8-0 for a 2-1 lead in the NLCS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — By the time Shohei Ohtani stepped to the plate in the eighth inning Wednesday night, the Los Angeles Dodgers were already in control. Once the ball left his bat, Game 3 of the National League Championship Series was over.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Lonzo Ball makes long-awaited return from knee injuries, scores 10 in Bulls' preseason game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the moment finally arrived, after multiple knee surgeries and one grueling rehab, Lonzo Ball raised his right arm and blew a kiss to the cheering United Center crowd. Fans rose to their feet as the announcement echoed through the arena: “Checking in for the Chicago Bulls! No.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ionescu's 3-pointer with 1 second left gives Liberty 80-77 win over Lynx and 2-1 lead in WNBA Finals
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Sabrina Ionescu watched Breanna Stewart carry the New York Liberty all game, until it was time to win it. Then the ball was hers. “In the timeout, (coach) Sandy (Brondello) was like, ‘You’re going to shoot the shot,'" Ionescu said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Giants' woes continue with loss of Andrew Thomas
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- Things have taken a massive downturn for the Giants. The Giants are 2 and 4 and now they have lost their franchise tackle Andrew Thomas for the season after undergoing surgery for a Lisfranc injury on his left foot.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Chicago Sports Network still unavailable for many fans, Blackhawks chairman unhappy about it, new report says
item.description: The Chicago Sports Network (CHSN) has debuted, but a lot of fans still can't watch the brand-new television home of the Bulls, Blackhawks and White Sox. And Blackhawks chairman Danny Wirtz is dissatisfied, according to a Sun-Times report this week.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks fall in Calgary to end season-opening road trip, host Sharks in home opener Thursday
item.description: CALGARY, Alberta (AP) — The Blackhawks will finally play on their home ice after a four-game Western Conference road trip to open the 2024-25 season. It was a trip with mixed results.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Yankees beat Guardians 6-3 for 2-0 ALCS lead
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Aaron Judge sent the ball soaring toward Monument Park and Gleyber Torres tagged up at first base. “That was disrespect out of Gleyber, man,” Judge said with a smile. “He’s seen me hit 58 of those things this year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's American League Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees. “It’s been a challenging year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cam Rising's legacy marred by injuries
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising will go down as one of the most successful quarterbacks in Utah history. Rising won 20 games over parts of three seasons, threw for 6,127 yards, 53 touchdowns, and led the Utes to back-to-back Pac-12 Championships and Rose Bowl appearances.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tom Brady's purchase of a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders is approved by NFL team owners
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Tom Brady has another new role in the NFL: owner. The seven-time Super Bowl champion purchased a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, a deal unanimously approved by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Jets acquire Raiders wide receiver Davante Adams, AP sources say
item.description: The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jets acquire wide receiver Davante Adams from Raiders, AP sources say
item.description: The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Food & Supply drive ahead of Tampa Bay Lightning game
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning hope to be the light tonight in a community devastated by back-to-back hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Chloe Sparks, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Cam Rising out for the season with lower leg injury
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising's return to the field lasted all of one game. Utah head coach Kyle Whittingham announced on Monday that Rising is out for the season after suffering a lower leg injury on the first series in Friday's 27-19 loss at Arizona State.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Los Angeles Clippers to make Intuit Dome debut Monday
item.description: For the first time in one quarter of a century, the Los Angeles Clippers will play a home game in their own, exclusive arena on Monday night. That's because the Intuit Dome, the $2 billion Inglewood arena, is now open seven years after it was first announced to be in the works.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Pro rider Cam Zink breaks ribs in hard fall during Red Bull Rampage mountain biking competition
item.description: Pro mountain biker Cameron Zink suffered six broken ribs and a punctured lung after a hard crash at Red Bull Rampage -- a particularly challenging freeride competition -- in southern Utah on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Former LSU pole vaulter Mondo Duplantis proposes to girlfriend during Vogue photo shoot
item.description: Duplantis got down on one knee and proposed to Desiré Inglander while taking photos in The Hamptons. According to Vogue Scandinavia, the couple has been together for four years.
item.dc:creator: Trinity Velazquez, NewsNation

item.title: North Carolina football player dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: UNC had honored Tylee Craft, 23, during Saturday's game. Coach Mack Brown, however, said he hadn't learned of Craft's death until after the game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Matt McCarty takes lead at Black Desert in his 2nd PGA Tour start
item.description: Matt McCarty took a two-stroke lead into the final round in his second PGA Tour start, shooting a 7-under 64 on Saturday in the inaugural Black Desert Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Thomas hits grand slam off Skubal, Guardians down Tigers 7-3 to reach AL Championship Series
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — For the third time in less than a month, the Cleveland Guardians made a semi-circle in the middle of their clubhouse and emptied champagne and beer bottles on each other as “Rocky Top” blasted through the speakers. The choice of music is unique. So is this team.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers announce starting pitcher for NLCS Game 1
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers relied on spectacular pitching to escape the NL Division Series in five games against the San Diego Padres, and it's nearly time to see if those performances will carry over into the NL Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Blackhawks visit Oilers in Western Conference play
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (0-1-1, in the Central Division) vs. Edmonton Oilers (0-1, in the Pacific Division) Edmonton, Alberta; Saturday, 10 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: How to cheer on the Padres for NLDS Game 5
item.description: Fans are still cheering on the San Diego Padres as they take on the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 of the National League Division Series Friday evening, following Wednesday's 8-0 blowout.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall will return to practice for the 1st time since he was shot
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall is set to return to practice next week for the first time since he was shot in the chest in a robbery attempt nine days before the season opener.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4
